creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
Tinderbox complains in my setup about the leftover file
usr/X11R6/lib/xine/plugins/1.1.3/xineplug_ao_out_jack.so
which is not listed in the pkg-list.

I've used the following environment variables
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/screenshots/ports/ports-desktop-19.01.2007-libxine-1.1.3-build.env.log

The resulting log with tinderbox:
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/screenshots/ports/ports-desktop-19.01.2007-libxine-1.1.3.log

How-To-Repeat: Set the environment variables specified in the file
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/screenshots/ports/ports-desktop-19.01.2007-libxine-1.1.3-build.env.log
and build libxine (with tinderbox e.g.).
